description: Composition Full length grey track pants made of 100% polyester, has a grey and black, broad elasticated waistband with drawstrings, insert side pockets with white piping, black piping from the waist to the hem along the sides, adjustable toggle straps at the hems and brand logo printed below the left pocket Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean preferred Wash inside out with like colours using mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Look stylish as you work out in the gym, go for a walk or jog in the park. These grey track pants from proline belong in your wardrobe as they'll add an instant spark to your look. The side pockets are spacious enough for everything from your wallet to iPod. The fabric is breathable, and the waist band is soft for a more snug fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it up with a cool t-shirt, an excellent pair of shoes, and you'll be ready to hit the road. Model statistics The product is a size M, length 44 inches on a model of height 6' and waist 32& rdquo
